author: CasaOS Community
description:
Etherpad is a real-time collaborative document editor where multiple people can edit the same pad simultaneously, with every change synchronized instantly and colour-coded per author.
Self-hosted, open source, and fully under your control, it is perfect for meeting notes, brainstorming, shared writing, and lightweight knowledge capture.
It ships with a built-in admin panel, a plugin ecosystem of 250+ add-ons, native DOCX/PDF/Markdown import & export, and multi-architecture container support (amd64 + arm64).

**Main Features:**
- Real-time collaborative editing with instant sync
- Per-author colour coding for clear writing attribution
- Built-in admin panel and a plugin ecosystem with 250+ add-ons
- Native DOCX, PDF, and Markdown import & export
- Open source, self-hosted deployment with amd64 and arm64 support

**Learn More:**
- [Etherpad Official Website](https://etherpad.org/)
- [Etherpad GitHub](https://github.com/ether/etherpad)
- [Etherpad Documentation](https://docs.etherpad.org/)

tips.before_install: Default admin password is "admin". Change ADMIN_PASSWORD before exposing Etherpad to the network. Pads are stored on-disk in /DATA/AppData/etherpad/var using the embedded dirty database; this is ideal for personal and small-team use. For heavy multi-user production workloads, switch DB_TYPE to postgres or mysql and point DB_HOST, DB_NAME, DB_USER, and DB_PASS at an external database.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 adds Tier 4 autonomous self-updates with maintenance windows, preflight checks, and email notifications for failures and rollbacks.
- It also introduces real SMTP delivery for updater mail and includes API, export, and HTTP security hardening plus localisation updates.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 adds Tier 4 autonomous self-updates with maintenance windows, preflight checks, and email notifications for failures and rollbacks.
- It also introduces real SMTP delivery for updater mail and includes API, export, and HTTP security hardening plus localisation updates.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 aggiunge auto-aggiornamenti autonomi di livello 4 con finestre di manutenzione, controlli preliminari e notifiche email per errori e rollback.
- Introduce anche l'invio SMTP reale per le email dell'updater e include miglioramenti di sicurezza per API, esportazione e HTTP oltre ad aggiornamenti di localizzazione.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 legger til Tier 4 autonome selvoppdateringer med vedlikeholdsvinduer, preflight-kontroller og e-postvarsler ved feil og tilbakerullinger.
- Den introduserer også ekte SMTP-levering for oppdateringsmailer og inkluderer sikkerhetsforbedringer for API, eksport og HTTP samt lokaliseringsoppdateringer.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 新增第 4 级自治自更新，支持维护时间窗口、预检检查，以及在失败和回滚时发送邮件通知。
- 同时加入了更新器邮件的真实 SMTP 发送能力，并包含 API、导出与 HTTP 安全加固以及本地化更新。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 では、メンテナンスウィンドウ、事前チェック、失敗やロールバック時のメール通知に対応した Tier 4 の自律セルフアップデートが追加されました。
- さらに、アップデーター用メールの実際の SMTP 配信、API・エクスポート・HTTP のセキュリティ強化、ローカライズ更新も含まれています。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- Etherpad v3.1.0은 유지보수 시간대, 사전 점검, 실패 및 롤백 시 이메일 알림을 포함한 Tier 4 자율 자체 업데이트를 추가했습니다.
- 또한 업데이트 메일의 실제 SMTP 전송을 도입했고 API, 내보내기, HTTP 보안 강화와 현지화 업데이트도 포함합니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 ajoute des auto-mises à jour autonomes de niveau 4 avec fenêtres de maintenance, vérifications préalables et notifications par e-mail en cas d'échec ou de rollback.
- Il introduit aussi l'envoi SMTP réel pour les e-mails de l'outil de mise à jour et inclut un renforcement de la sécurité des API, des exports et de HTTP ainsi que des mises à jour de localisation.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 ergänzt autonome Selbstaktualisierungen der Stufe 4 mit Wartungsfenstern, Vorabprüfungen und E-Mail-Benachrichtigungen bei Fehlern und Rollbacks.
- Außerdem führt es echten SMTP-Versand für Updater-E-Mails ein und enthält Sicherheitsverbesserungen für API, Export und HTTP sowie Lokalisierungsupdates.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 lägger till autonoma självuppdateringar på nivå 4 med underhållsfönster, förhandskontroller och e-postaviseringar vid fel och återställningar.
- Det inför också riktig SMTP-leverans för uppdateringsmejl och innehåller säkerhetshärdning för API, export och HTTP samt lokaliseringsuppdateringar.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το Etherpad v3.1.0 προσθέτει αυτόνομες αυτοενημερώσεις επιπέδου 4 με παράθυρα συντήρησης, προληπτικούς ελέγχους και ειδοποιήσεις email για αποτυχίες και επαναφορές.
- Εισάγει επίσης πραγματική αποστολή SMTP για τα email του updater και περιλαμβάνει ενίσχυση ασφάλειας για API, export και HTTP, μαζί με ενημερώσεις τοπικοποίησης.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 dodaje autonomna samoažuriranja razine 4 s vremenskim prozorima održavanja, prethodnim provjerama i obavijestima e-poštom za pogreške i vraćanja.
- Također uvodi stvarnu SMTP isporuku za poruke ažuriranja te uključuje sigurnosna poboljšanja za API, izvoz i HTTP, kao i ažuriranja lokalizacije.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- O Etherpad v3.1.0 adiciona autoatualizações autónomas de nível 4 com janelas de manutenção, verificações prévias e notificações por email para falhas e reversões.
- Introduz também envio SMTP real para os emails do atualizador e inclui reforços de segurança em API, exportação e HTTP, além de atualizações de localização.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- Etherpad v3.1.0 добавляет автономные самообновления уровня 4 с окнами обслуживания, предварительными проверками и уведомлениями по email о сбоях и откатах.
- Также он вводит полноценную SMTP-доставку писем обновлятора и включает усиление безопасности API, экспорта и HTTP, а также обновления локализации.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- Etherpad v3.1.0; bakım pencereleri, ön kontroller ve hata ya da geri alma durumları için e-posta bildirimleri içeren Tier 4 otonom öz güncellemeleri ekler.
- Ayrıca güncelleyici postaları için gerçek SMTP gönderimini sunar ve API, dışa aktarma ve HTTP tarafında güvenlik iyileştirmeleriyle birlikte yerelleştirme güncellemeleri içerir.

title: Etherpad
